notes:
Native Steam: downloaded and 'installed' just fine, when clicking 'play' no process is created and after a few seconds steam realizes this and just shows the green play button again.

With GE-Proton9-15 the game starts but does not respond an trying to load an existing safegame. A new safegame runs for a few second then freezes.
Game main window appears and then freezes/process hangs within a few seconds regardless of behavior (whether left sitting on main menu, starting a new game, or loading a save game).

cpu: AMD FX-7500 Radeon R7, 10 Compute Cores 4C+6G
